description:
AI & Emerging Technology Specialist

Location: Adelaide, Australia

Employment Type: Full-time




We’re a dynamic digital and marketing agency based in Adelaide looking for a specialist to craft new and innovative solutions using AI & Emerging Technology.




The Role

This role is perfect for someone who is early in their AI journey and likes working on solving real-world problems using emerging technology. The role will require you to build AI tools for data analysis, systems integrations, automation, and applied problem-solving across our diverse client base.




Required Experience & Skills

· Genuine passion for technology, innovation and experimentation.

· Foundational AI/ML Knowledge: Understanding of LLMs, APIs (OpenAI, Anthropic, etc.), and prompt engineering fundamentals

· Programming Proficiency: Experience with Python or JavaScript/Node.js for building AI-powered applications

· API Integration: Ability to integrate third-party APIs and build data pipeline

· Problem-Solving Mindset: Strong analytical skills and ability to translate business problems into technical solutions

· Self-Directed Learning: Demonstrated commitment to staying current with rapidly evolving AI technologies

· At least 1 year of experience in a technical role (development, data analysis, or similar) or relevant strong personal portfolio.




Key Responsibilities

· Design and develop AI-powered tools and workflows for client projects

· Build automation solutions that leverage LLMs and emerging AI capabilities

· Integrate AI capabilities into existing systems and platforms

· Conduct data analysis and create insights using AI-assisted methodologies

· Collaborate with project teams to identify opportunities for AI implementation

· Research and evaluate new AI tools and technologies for potential application

· Document AI solutions and create implementation guides for clients

· Provide technical support and training on AI tools and systems

· Ability to communicate technical concepts to non-technical audiences




Nice to Have

• Experience with Laravel, PHP, or other web development frameworks

• Knowledge of data visualization tools and techniques

• Familiarity with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud)

• Experience with no-code/low-code AI platforms (Make, Zapier, n8n)




What We Offer

• Opportunity to work on diverse client projects across multiple industries

• Collaborative team environment in Adelaide's growing tech scene

• Professional development for AI/tech training and certifications

• Exposure to AI technologies and real-world applications




This is a unique opportunity to be at the intersection of creativity and innovation – evaluating, implementing and mastering the latest technologies while helping shape how our growing agency works and what we can offer clients.




Applications to

Vajira Dias

Head of Tech

AmplifyD

0420 281 841
